title: House GOP Letter Targets Private UFO Contractors
description: A House Republican has opened a new front in the congressional push for UFO transparency, directing his investigation at the private research labs that hold much of the government's most closely guarded defense work.

title: Secret UFO Recovery Program Hid ‘Multiple Alien Species,’ Claims Hal Puthoff | WATCH
description: A former CIA-funded researcher has sparked global controversy after claiming that the United States may have recovered four distinct alien species from crashed UFOs. Dr. Hal Puthoff made the shocking remarks during an appearance on “The Diary of a CEO” podcast with Steve Bartlett, alongside filmmaker Dan Farah. The discussion referenced alleged classified programs, past intelligence testimonies, and ongoing UFO crash retrieval theories, reigniting debate over whether non-human life has already been encountered by governments.

title: FBI agent 'feared for her life' after reporting UFO sighting to bureau
description: A female FBI informant agent claimed she 'feared for her life' in 1967 after reporting her UFO experiences to the agency, the declassified UFO files show

title: Religious Leaders Sound Alarm After ‘Chilling’ Secret UFO Disclosure Meetings
description: Several Christian pastors and religious leaders are sounding the alarm after claiming they were secretly briefed by U.S. government intelligence insiders and former military personnel preparing for the Trump administration’s ongoing UFO disclosure rollout. title: UFO Gaming Trading Down 11.2% Over Last Week (UFO)
